name: UAE Embassy in Belgrade — Commissioner General's office

contact.person: H.E. Ahmed Hatem Almenhali (Ambassador & Commissioner General)

outreach.notes: FILLS THE UAE GAP: MOFA officially names Ambassador Ahmed Hatem Almenhali as Commissioner General of the UAE for Expo 2027 Belgrade (VERIFIED A on mofa.gov.ae 2026-07-06; note earlier press spelling 'Ahmed Barghash Al Menhali' — MOFA spelling wins). No email published; embassy contact routes via mofa.gov.ae/en/missions/belgrade.
